pages.text: $(l)Botanical Burst$() fires a concentrated mana burst projectile at your target.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 8$(br)$(l)Type:$() Attack$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 20,000 + 10,000/level$(br2)The projectile deals magic damage and leaves a trail of cherry leaf particles. At higher levels, damage increases significantly. Enhanced by the Velocity Lens and Bore Lens catalysts.
